0
Coins: 0

CLOUD RUNNER

Learn AWS while you run.



How to Play

Controls
  • ← → or A/D — Switch lanes
  • ↑ or W or Space — Jump over barriers
  • ↓ or S — Slide under overhead bars
  • Enter — Confirm quiz answer
Orbs & Learning
  • Colored orbs spawn before each quiz — grab them to unlock notes about an AWS service.
  • When a quiz pops up, you can open your collected notes to help answer it.
  • Questions only test what you've been taught — reading your notes is always enough to answer.
  • The more questions you get right for a service, the harder its questions become.
Strikes & Lives
  • You get two lives. Hitting a barrier or overhead obstacle (or answering wrong) costs one.
  • After your first strike a cop starts chasing you — answer 2 questions correctly in a row to lose the cop and reset your strikes.
  • A second strike of any kind ends the run.
  • Running into a train always ends the run instantly.
Goal
  • Run as far as you can, collect coins, grab orbs, and answer quizzes to learn real AWS concepts.
  • At the end of each run you'll see a full review of every question you were asked.

GAME OVER

Score: 0

Coins: 0

What You Ran Into

Take a moment to read through these before the quiz.

Run Complete

Loading question...
Use ← → to select, then press ENTER to run for your answer
View notes ▾
You didn't grab the notes orb for this one — answering from memory.
Press ENTER to continue
